actionMinHeight.$description: Minimum touch-target height for default action density (medium buttons, inputs, selects). 36px is the WCAG 2.2 target size.

actionMinHeightSmall.$description: Minimum touch-target height for compact controls (small button variant). Below WCAG 2.2 — intended for high-density contexts where users have other affordances.

actionMinHeightLarge.$description: Minimum touch-target height for prominent controls (large button variant). Comfortable above 44px iOS / 48px Material guideline.
